message:
Running command: # DRT-0302 on bterm VDDIO. Let me check if VDDIO is in the design at all.
# The padframe uses VDDIO for the I/O power. VDDIO should NOT be a bterm in standalone design.
#
# Check the DEF file for VDDIO pins
grep -n "VDDIO" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.def | head -20
